tmap.sources 0.1

    • PMTiles

PMTiles

Source: vignettes/pmtiles.Rmd
pmtiles.Rmd

Mode maplibre

Currently, the only mode that supports pmtiles is maplibre:

tmap_mode("maplibre")
#> ℹ tmap modes "plot" -> "view" -> "mapbox" -> "maplibre"
#> ℹ rotate with `tmap::rtm()`switch to "plot" with `tmap::ttm()`

OvertureMaps contain a few very large pmtiles; one with all the buildings:

tm_shape("https://overturemaps-tiles-us-west-2-beta.s3.amazonaws.com/2024-07-22/buildings.pmtiles", bbox = "Amsterdam") +
    tm_polygons(fill = "#ee7700") +
    tm_maplibre(zoom = 14)

Developed by Martijn Tennekes.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
